title: Random OneBlock
description: One block, but you get random items
body:
This mod adds 2 blocks:
- Random Lucky Block
- Random One Block

The difference: The one block regenerates, the lucky block doesn't

Fully compatible with other mods, also using modded items in the drop pool.
I recommend adding a bunch of other mods to make the challenge more interesting

IMPORTANT!!
To create a OneBlock world:
1. Create new world
2. Select Superflat
3. Go to presets and select Void world
4. Go to Game rules
5. Set the game rule generate OneBlock to true
